targets.query:
from(bucket: "water")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer" and r._field == "TDS")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "TDS")

from(bucket: "water")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer" and r._field == "TDS")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _time: r._time, _value: float(v: r._value)/10000.0 }))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "salinity")

from(bucket: "water")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer" and r._field == "humidity")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "humidity")

water = from(bucket: "water")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "waterTemp" and r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer")
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "waterTemp"})

hum = from(bucket: "water")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "humidity" and r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer")
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "humidity"})

join(tables: {w: water, h: hum}, on: ["_time"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _time: r._time, _value: r.waterTemp - ((100.0 - r.humidity)/5.0) }))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "dewPoint")

from(bucket: "water")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer" and r._field == "TDS")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _time: r._time, _value: float(v: r._value)/0.64 }))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "EC")

from(bucket: "water")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer" and r._field == "ambientTemp")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "ambientTemp")

from(bucket: "water")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer" and r._field == "waterTemp")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "waterTemp")

from(bucket: "water")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer" and r._field == "waterTemp")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "waterTemp")

tds = from(bucket: "water")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "TDS" and r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer")
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "TDS"})

temp = from(bucket: "water")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "waterTemp" and r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer")
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "waterTemp"})

join(tables: {t: tds, w: temp}, on: ["_time"])
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ _time: r._time, _value: r.TDS / (1.0 + 0.02 * (r.waterTemp - 25.0)) }))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "TDS25")

from(bucket:"water")
  |> range(start:-24h)
  |> filter(fn:(r)=>r._field=="TDS" and r._measurement=="mqtt_consumer")
  |> map(fn:(r)=>({ _time:r._time, _value: float(v:r._value)*0.5 }))
  |> aggregateWindow(every:5m, fn:mean, createEmpty:false)
  |> yield(name:"hardness")

panels.title: Water Hardness (Ca²⁺ + Mg²⁺ as ppm CaCO₃)

targets.query:
water = from(bucket: "water")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer" and r._field == "waterTemp")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "waterTemp"})

tds = from(bucket: "water")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer" and r._field == "TDS")
  |> keep(columns: ["_time", "_value"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "TDS"})

join(tables: {tds: tds, water: water}, on: ["_time"])
|> map(fn: (r) => ({
    _time: r._time,
    _value: if r.TDS > 600.0 and r.waterTemp > 30.0 then 3.0
            else if r.TDS > 300.0 and r.waterTemp > 25.0 then 2.0
            else 1.0,
    _field: "scalingRisk"
}))
|> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

from(bucket:"water")
  |> range(start:-24h)
  |> filter(fn:(r)=>r._field=="TDS" and r._measurement=="mqtt_consumer")
  |> map(fn:(r)=>({ _time:r._time, _value: float(v:r._value)*0.5 }))
  |> aggregateWindow(every:5m, fn:mean, createEmpty:false)
  |> yield(name:"hardness")

panels.title: Water Hardness (Ca²⁺ + Mg²⁺ as ppm CaCO₃)

targets.query:
from(bucket: "water")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer" and r._field == "TDS")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "TDS")

from(bucket: "water")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer" and (r._field == "waterTemp" or r._field == "TDS"))
  |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey:["_field"], valueColumn:"_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      _value: 100.0
        - (if r.TDS > 300.0 then (r.TDS - 300.0) * 0.05 else 0.0)
        - (if r.waterTemp < 15.0 or r.waterTemp > 35.0 then 10.0 else 0.0),
      _field: "WQI"
  }))
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      _value: if r._value < 0.0 then 0.0 else r._value,
      _field: r._field
  }))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "WQI")

from(bucket:"water")
  |> range(start:-24h)
  |> filter(fn:(r)=>r._field=="TDS" and r._measurement=="mqtt_consumer")
  |> map(fn:(r)=>({
      _time:r._time,
      _value: if r._value > 900 then 3.0
              else if r._value > 600 then 2.0
              else 1.0
  }))
  |> aggregateWindow(every:5m, fn:mean, createEmpty:false)
  |> yield(name:"risk")

from(bucket:"water")
  |> range(start:-24h)
  |> filter(fn:(r)=>r._field=="TDS" and r._measurement=="mqtt_consumer")
  |> map(fn:(r)=>({ _time:r._time, _value: 1.0 + (float(v:r._value)*0.0008) }))
  |> aggregateWindow(every:5m, fn:mean, createEmpty:false)
  |> yield(name:"density")

import "math"

from(bucket:"water")
  |> range(start:-24h)
  |> filter(fn:(r)=>r._field=="TDS" and r._measurement=="mqtt_consumer")
  |> map(fn:(r)=>({ _time:r._time, _value: 7.0 - (0.1 * math.log10(x: float(v:r._value)/100.0)) }))
  |> aggregateWindow(every:5m, fn:mean, createEmpty:false)
  |> yield(name:"pH_estimate")

from(bucket: "water")
  |> range(start: -24h)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer" and (r._field == "waterTemp" or r._field == "TDS"))
  |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey:["_field"], valueColumn:"_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      _value: 100.0
        - (if r.TDS > 300.0 then (r.TDS - 300.0) * 0.05 else 0.0)
        - (if r.waterTemp < 15.0 or r.waterTemp > 35.0 then 10.0 else 0.0),
      _field: "WQI"
  }))
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      _value: if r._value < 0.0 then 0.0 else r._value,
      _field: r._field
  }))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "WQI")

from(bucket:"water")
  |> range(start:-24h)
  |> filter(fn:(r)=>r._field=="TDS" and r._measurement=="mqtt_consumer")
  |> derivative(unit:1h, nonNegative:false)
  |> aggregateWindow(every:5m, fn:mean, createEmpty:false)
  |> yield(name:"TDS_slope")

from(bucket:"water")
  |> range(start:-24h)
  |> filter(fn:(r)=>r._field=="TDS" and r._measurement=="mqtt_consumer")
  |> map(fn:(r)=>({ _time:r._time, _value: -0.056*float(v:r._value) }))
  |> aggregateWindow(every:5m, fn:mean, createEmpty:false)
  |> yield(name:"freezing")

from(bucket:"water")
  |> range(start:-24h)
  |> filter(fn:(r)=>r._field=="TDS" and r._measurement=="mqtt_consumer")
  |> map(fn:(r)=>({ _time:r._time, _value: 100.0 + (0.03*float(v:r._value)) }))
  |> aggregateWindow(every:5m, fn:mean, createEmpty:false)
  |> yield(name:"boiling")

from(bucket: "water")
  |> range(start: -7d)
  |> filter(fn: (r) =>
    r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer" and (r._field == "waterTemp" or r._field == "TDS"))
  |> pivot(rowKey:["_time"], columnKey:["_field"], valueColumn:"_value")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      _value: 100.0
        - (if r.TDS > 300.0 then (r.TDS - 300.0) * 0.05 else 0.0)
        - (if r.waterTemp < 15.0 or r.waterTemp > 35.0 then 10.0 else 0.0),
      _field: "WQI"
  }))
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({
      _time: r._time,
      _value: if r._value < 0.0 then 0.0 else r._value,
      _field: r._field
  }))
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 5m, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "WQI_trend")

from(bucket:"water")
  |> range(start:-24h)
  |> filter(fn:(r)=>r._field=="TDS" and r._measurement=="mqtt_consumer")
  |> aggregateWindow(every:5m, fn:mean, createEmpty:false)
  |> yield(name:"TDS_trend")
